channel.title: Bookmark-Manager on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Bookmark-Manager on Arrans github.io

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, organize, and preserve webpages, articles, and documents.

item.title: hoarder-app/hoarder
item.description: A self-hostable bookmark-everything app (links, notes and images) with AI-based automatic tagging and full text search
